inputs.label: Parent Item Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Production order quantity for the parent item.

businessContext_i18n.en: Production order quantity for the parent item.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ana ürün için üretim emri miktarı.

inputs.label: BOM Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Number of child items required per one parent item.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of child items required per one parent item.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir ana ürün başına gereken alt ürün sayısı.

inputs.label: Scrap Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of child items scrapped during production.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of child items scrapped during production.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim sırasında hurdaya çıkması beklenen alt ürünlerin yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Safety Stock Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage for safety stock to cover uncertainties.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage for safety stock to cover uncertainties.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirsizlikleri karşılamak için emniyet stoku olarak eklenen yüzde.
